name: Beckman Coulter, Inc.
description: Beckman Coulter, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer and marketer of biomedical testing instrument systems, tests, and supplies that simplify and automate laboratory processes. The company's products are used in all phases of the battle against disease, from pioneering medical research and drug discovery to clinical diagnostics. Beckman Coulter's diagnostic systems are found in hospitals and other clinical laboratories around the world, while its life science instruments are used in universities, government laboratories, and biotechnology and pharmaceutical companies.
